---
title: "video_test"
---

## Video

<video width="640" height="360" controls>

<source src="videos/0411.mp4" type="video/mp4">

Your browser does not support the video tag. </video>

## Video



<video width="640" height="360" controls>

<source src="https://github.com/gisurgonc/talks/raw/refs/heads/main/videos/0411.mp4" type="video/mp4">

Your browser does not support the video tag. </video>

## Video 3

<https://github.com/gisurgonc/talks/raw/refs/heads/main/videos/0411.mp4>
